result.stderr:
dngrep.tool 0.0.2
Copyright (C) 2026 psxvoid

  -t, --target            (Default: Any) The type of the entity to search for
                          (e.g. any, class, etc)

  -c, --contains          A part of the target name (e.g. Foo) to filter for.
                          Supports multiple space-separated values.

  -e, --exclude           A part of the target name (e.g. Foo) to exclude from
                          results. Supports multiple space-separated values.

  -r, --regexp            (Default: false) Enables passing regular expressions
                          to contains and exclude options. (default=false).

  -s, --scope             (Default: None) The type, containing the target (e.g.
                          namespace, class, etc)

  -C, --scope-contains    A part of the target scope name (e.g. Foo) to include
                          in results. Supports multiple space-separated values.

  -E, --scope-exclude     A part of the target scope name (e.g. Foo) to exclude
                          from results. Supports multiple space-separated
                          values.

  -p, --path-contains     A part of a file path of the target to include.

  -P, --path-exclude      A part of a file path of the target to exclude.

  -n, --show-full-name    (Default: true) When set to true, then output will
                          contain full target name, including namespace, etc
                          (default=true).

  -l, --show-file-path    (Default: true) When set to true, then output will
                          contain a file name (location), containing the target.
                          (default=true).

  -L, --show-location     (Default: true) When set to true, then output will
                          contain a line and, the character location of the
                          target. (default=true).

  --hide-namespaces       (Default: false) When set to true, then namespaces
                          will be omitted when show-full-name is used, ignored
                          else (default=false).

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

Copyright (C) 2026 psxvoid

  -t, --target            (Default: Any) The type of the entity to search for

options.description: A part of the target name (e.g. Foo) to filter for. Supports multiple space-separated values.
A part of the target name (e.g. Foo) to exclude from results. Supports multiple space-separated values.
When set to true, then namespaces will be omitted when show-full-name is used, ignored else (default=false).
A part of a file path of the target to include.
A part of a file path of the target to exclude.
Enables passing regular expressions to contains and exclude options. (default=false).
The type, containing the target (e.g. namespace, class, etc)
A part of the target scope name (e.g. Foo) to include in results. Supports multiple space-separated values.
A part of the target scope name (e.g. Foo) to exclude from results. Supports multiple space-separated values.
When set to true, then output will contain a file name (location), containing the target. (default=true).
When set to true, then output will contain full target name, including namespace, etc (default=true).
When set to true, then output will contain a line and, the character location of the target. (default=true).
The type of the entity to search for (e.g. any, class, etc)
